Document:
# Weapons & Ammo
Weapons in Nuclear 14 range from improvised pistols to military-grade energy guns and heavy weapons. Ammunition matters just as much as the weapon itself, so learn what your gear uses before you head into a fight.
## Weapon Families
This section is split into weapon categories so you can quickly find the type of gear you are looking for.
- [color=#a4885c]Ranged Weapons[/color]: firearms, energy guns, and heavy weapons. - [color=#a4885c]Melee Weapons[/color]: knives, clubs, spears, and other close-combat gear. - [color=#a4885c]Explosives[/color]: grenades, launchers, mines, and demolition tools.
## Ammunition Basics
Always match the weapon to the correct magazine, cartridge, cell, or shell. Running dry in the middle of a fight is usually fatal.
See the sub-sections for detailed guides on [color=#a4885c]Ranged Weapons[/color] and the weapon categories under them.
